query:
UPDATE customer_rules 
SET 
  locationPriorityPatterns = '[]',
  locationExclusionPatterns = '[{"pattern":"^1[01]","label":"Building 1 (exclude)"}]',
  notes = 'Calgary warehouse: exclude Building 1 locations (10#### and 11####). Use pure FEFO (oldest receiveItemId first) within all other locations.'
WHERE customerName LIKE '%Amercare%';
